strengths: Excellent adherence to the neon retro arcade aesthetic.
Strong color contrast and readable silhouette for an icon.
Motion trails on the dropping discs effectively convey gameplay action.
issues: Incorrect board dimensions: The image depicts a 6-column grid, but the prompt explicitly requested exactly 7 columns (standard Connect Four size).
Unrealistic game state: The board shows a horizontal winning line for Yellow (row 2) AND a horizontal winning line for Red (row 3). In a real game, it would end after the first line is formed.
Pixel consistency: Some 'pixels' vary in size slightly, typical of AI generation, though not very distracting at icon size.
revisedPrompt: Connect Four mini game lobby icon. 16-bit pixel art style. A blue vertical game grid with exactly 7 columns and 6 rows. The board contains red and yellow discs. There is exactly one horizontal line of 4 RED discs in the middle, indicating a win. Yellow discs are scattered without forming a line. Above the grid, one red disc and one yellow disc are falling with pixelated motion blur. Neon arcade colors, thick outlines, centered composition, dark background.
